notes: Account models live under app.modules.accounts and register with the shared SQLAlchemy Base metadata.
Tenant, user, tenant membership, admin user and plan tables are modeled separately instead of carrying forward the old monolithic SQLite helper shape.
Alembic revision 0002_account_models creates the account tables and constraints from a clean database.
No default administrator row is created by metadata or migrations.
Admin users retain must_change_password default true for CLI-created lifecycle in later tasks.
Tenant membership creates an explicit tenant-user ownership boundary for upcoming tenant-scoped repositories.
Status, plan and role check constraints prevent unsupported account states from entering the database.
